title: ctenitis macrosora
intro: Ctenitis macrosora is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Ctenitis macrosora is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations have also been used in the form of tinctures and ointments to support overall health and well-being.
